name: Weekly Goal
about: This issue represents the goal of the week for the whole team.

labels: Parent Task
assignees: ''

# Week YYYY-WW: <Theme> (Mon DD–Sun DD)

## Objective
<1–2 sentences: what we’re trying to achieve this week>

## Deliverables (end of week)
- [ ] D1: <deliverable>
- [ ] D2: <deliverable>
- [ ] D3: <deliverable>

## Definition of Done
- [ ] All sub-issues are closed OR explicitly moved to next week’s parent
- [ ] PRs/results are linked below
- [ ] Key decisions and open questions are documented

## Sub-issues (assign to individuals)
> Use GitHub “Add sub-issue” to attach items below, OR paste issue links here.

- [ ] #<sub-issue-1>
- [ ] #<sub-issue-2>
- [ ] #<sub-issue-3>
- [ ] #<sub-issue-4>

## Status (update during the week)
- **Current status:** <On track / At risk / Blocked>
- **Top blockers:** <list>
- **Next checkpoint:** <date + what will be reviewed>

## Risks / Blockers
- <risk 1>
- <risk 2>

## Links / Artifacts
- Project board: <link>
- Key doc/spec: <link>
- Main PR(s): <link(s)>
- Experiment runs/results: <link(s)>
